Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes R1 Concepts website for current brake part products, promotions, pricing, and featured categories.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using target keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand niche.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps and gaps in DFC's two-piece rotor coverage.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Provides a clear view of where DFC already competes and where new product opportunities exist, directly informing purchasing and product development decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about demand and interest for specific two-piece rotor applications identified in the gap analysis.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from the customer base before committing to new inventory, reducing the risk of stocking slow-moving parts.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, actionable document combining competitor intelligence, DFC coverage gaps, and customer demand data to drive product line decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting every piece of ad copy including headlines, descriptions, and call-to-action fields.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility across all running ad copy without requiring manual review of each campaign, ensuring no active ad is overlooked.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches the extracted ad copy for specific flagged phrases and identifies the exact field and full copy text where each match occurs.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance issues, outdated messaging, or prohibited claims across hundreds of ads in seconds, preventing costly policy violations or brand inconsistencies.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email listing every flagged match, organized by campaign and ad, showing the specific field and copy where each phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an immediately actionable flagged-ad report to the team's inbox, enabling fast remediation without logging into multiple ad platforms.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking **53 total agents** — **24 completed**, **9 in progress**, and **20 planned**. This week we added four new agents to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen tool for the Midway Place sublet; **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI** for optimizing Amazon ad campaigns across both brands; **R1 Video Clipper**; and **Paid Channel Chat Bot**. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to Completed, giving us a polished new version of our weekly pipeline reporting. Steady momentum across the board — more updates coming next week!
